description: Seamless.AI is a real-time sales intelligence tool that finds verified B2B emails and phone numbers, helping sales teams build accurate prospect lists fast.
overview: Seamless.AI uses a real-time search engine to find verified B2B contact details for sales and marketing teams, with one-click exports into popular CRMs.
what_is: Seamless.AI is a sales intelligence tool that helps teams find accurate B2B contact information quickly. Its real-time search engine returns fresh data on a large database of contacts and companies, so records stay current rather than going stale in a static list.

It is most useful when you need to build or enrich a prospect list fast, identify ready-to-buy accounts, or track job changes at key companies. Results come back in seconds, which speeds up list building and helps teams get into outreach sooner.

Seamless.AI integrates with CRMs and sales platforms like Salesforce and HubSpot for one-click exports and enrichment. It is not a full CRM or marketing-automation tool; it works best as a contact-data source inside your existing stack.
